---
title: "Systematic review and meta-analysis of preclinical studies"
author: 
- Ineichen
- Held
- Salanti
- et al.
publication: "Nat Rev Methods Primers, **4**, 72 (2024)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - pharmacology
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s43586-024-00347-x
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nat Rev Methods Primers"
issue: 4
page: 72
year: 2024
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s43586-024-00347-x
---
